This is something we wanted to do once, and the reason is because, as I told you guys before, like I wanted to go through an immersion event with you guys and just dump a ton of stuff on you. And I wanted to do it on purpose, I wanted to give you guys so much stuff, and you should be feeling like this. Okay, for feeling like this is a good thing, but hopefully now you're starting to connect a lot of dots, right? Who here feels like a lot of the questions and stuff, you start to see all the dots. Everything's not clear yet, but all these things have all kind of come together. Cool, fuzzy dots, okay. That was the goal of this, right? Now moving forward, it's kind of interesting, whenever I go to an event, a lot of times I struggle, because I got an entire yellow notepad full of thousands of pages of stuff, and I'm like, I don't know where to start, right? It's like walking to the library and seeing a million books, and I'm like, huh, what should I learn today? Like, where do I go, right? And so for all you guys, I want to kind of give you what I do that's helped me immensely, so when I leave an event and I go home, I actually take what I learned, I implement it very, very quickly. I take the time, all of you guys are gonna be going home, you're either gonna be driving or flying or whatever, but use that time when you've got an hour or two hours of downtime to look through your notes, read, read through everything, and really figure out kind of for you where you're at in this process. Everyone's got different spots, you know? And the biggest thing you can do is sit down and figure out, like, what's the first thing? Okay, it's kind of the one thing, what's the first thing I need to do? And what's the second thing? And all I do whenever I come home from an event, I sit down and take all my notes, and I map out a timeline of not like when or how, it's just what's the first thing I need to do, the second, the third, the fourth, and everything based on what I understand now from being here for a week, for a weekend, how long you've been here for, is what are the steps in the process? And when you get home, now you've got a blueprint, okay? Now for most of you guys, if I was you right now, going back through this, the things I would do would be very, very simple. First thing I would do is I would really sit down and figure out this, okay? Figure out exactly what it is I wanna be selling at each of these steps, right? Okay, where do I wanna take my people? This is coming back to this one, right? Where do I wanna take these people? I'll be the first thing I wanna find out, okay? And then kind of what are these different pieces throughout here? Second thing I would figure out is like, who do I really wanna have? And I would really spend some time thinking about this, you guys. I wish that 10 years ago, somebody would have told me that I would spend a lot of time sitting down architecting exactly who I wanted, okay? I didn't, I just went out there and started doing stuff and ended up for years having the type of customers I wasn't in love with. It took me a lot of time and effort, and a year and a half ago, if I sit down and say, who do we actually wanna be working with to be able to architect you guys? That's how we got you guys in the room. You guys are amazing people. So figure out exactly who you want. Number three I'd work on is the bait. Okay, what's that first thing you're gonna create? Okay, and I think that I've stressed it over and over and over again, my belief in free plus shipping, the fact you can create it fast and easy. I would just, what's the first free plus shipping thing I'm gonna make? You can do what Simon did, take an interview, record yourself, whatever it is, but just make something really, really quick so you can have some bait to throw out there. Cause as soon as you have something tangible, for whatever reason, things start moving forward. If you just keep thinking about it forever and everything ever happens. So figure out some bait, after you have the bait now, then come back and start building out the funnel. Just log in and click funnels, and just kinda take all these pieces out. Actually, yeah, so funnel here, map out your funnel, then five here would be quick funnels. Log in and start building it out. So I built out all the different pieces. Now the pieces are built out, all the pages are there. Next I would come back and I would start doing my sales videos for each of these different pieces, upsells, downsells. I'd forgot that, now all the pieces are in place, then I come back to the where, I start testing out some Facebook ads. Yeah, I got bad handwriting. Quick funnels. That's kinda the process I would personally go through. So if you guys, I would look at that and start stepping out, going through those pieces. Now again, in a week from now, two weeks now, whenever you get to this point, you're gonna be like, I don't remember any of that stuff. I remember it was cool, I kinda remember it, but I don't remember it, okay? You're not gonna remember it. The goal is for you to remember everything. Go for you to understand it. That was why we dumped so much on you so fast. You need to understand it. Now we can come back and say, okay, I wanna figure out how to do this. Can you get to Facebook? You probably not gonna remember everything John said the first night, right? But do you remember the concept? I can find people with huge Facebook fan pages, I can throw my bait out there. You understand the concept, that was the goal. Now we can come back when we're at this spot, and now let's figure that out. Let's find the tools, the resources, let's go through all that kinda stuff and dig a lot deeper. And we'll have more the actual how-to strategic piece of each of these happening inside of the new members area for you guys here very, very soon. Again, this event was a lot of the overall hierarchy strategy and then, you guys don't even know this yet, we have a new inner circle members area coming up where we're next, the next step is not any strategic stuff, it's gonna be going through the tactical of like, let's actually just build this whole thing all the way through, kinda over the shoulder type thing. And so when you get to this part, you'll have all the resources to actually watch John so they're gonna do it over and over and over again, then you can just copy him and just do it, okay? So that's kind of what I would recommend doing you guys. The couple other things is make sure you find your accountability partner you met on Monday and I would set up a time for early as possible to set up your accountability meeting with someone and this is the kinda stuff you should be holding each other accountable to. You should be saying, okay, this is my deal, buy, this is Tuesday morning, buy next Tuesday or two weeks from now, I'm gonna have this, this and this done. If not, you get to cash my check, okay? The next week we're gonna end up pounding it out, okay? Your accountability partner should, again, find someone, if you don't have someone yet, find somebody and leverage that person, that's gonna be the thing that kinda kicks your butt and keeps you moving on to the next level. I have one last story that I'll be done. When I first got into this business, I had a chance to listen to an interview with Gary Halber and with someone else, I can remember who now. Anyway, they did this interview and they were talking about this concept called Letter Gold. It was interesting, he was talking about when the Mexican mafia, when they need to change laws and they need to do stuff, he said, they basically had this concept called Plato Aplomo, Letter Gold. So what would happen is the Mexican mafia comes down, they're like, we need to change the law and they come to the government, say, hey, we need to change this law so we can sell more drugs or whatever. The government's like, no, we're not gonna do that, you're crazy. It says, okay, okay, that's fine. And so that night they all go home, they go to bed and the mafia breaks into the guy's house, they can make the decisions. He comes in there and he's got a gun and a bag of gold and says, you've got two choices. You're gonna change the law and if you do, you get gold, if not, you get lead. So what do you want, Letter Gold, make your choice. And guess what happens? Somehow magically, laws are changed and things happen, right? When your options are Letter Gold, things change. Now if you wanna be successful in this business, the biggest reason why most people I think are not successful is they come in this, say, okay, I'm gonna try to get this done, I'm gonna try to get this done, I'm gonna try to get this done, they never get anything done. The biggest reason why I think I'm successful in this business is because when I have a goal, I set deadlines on every single thing and we have Letter Gold dates. I know that this is gonna happen, we're gonna launch this on this day, I got one of two options. I'm gonna die, I'm gonna make a bunch of money. Those are my only two options. Ask my team, every single day, the day before we launch, anything weird there till four or five, six o'clock in the morning, going crazy because I know that if I go to bed, I'm gonna die. Can I trick my mind to believe that? We had so much MMA at night before we launched the beta version for ClickFunnels. Todd was out here, we were going crazy for five or six nights in a row, I almost collapsed before we gave you guys access to the first time, it was crazy. But I knew we had to get it to happen. Because I promise you guys, if you don't trick your mind like that and you're just like, I'll get it done, I'll get it done, it'll keep moving, it'll keep moving, it'll keep moving and it'll never get done, ever. I don't care if you set your due date tomorrow or six months from now, the night before, you're gonna be up till three o'clock in the morning, four o'clock in the morning, because that's just the way humans work. We always do that way. We set goals that are aggressive with your accountability partner, set letter goal dates, say, look, we got two options, I'm either gonna die or we're gonna make some money. I don't know about you guys, but I like making money. Who here likes making money? Awesome, okay, so that's your goal with your accountability partners. Outside of that, you guys, congratulations. I wanna give you guys a round of applause for putting me up, or putting up with me for three days. Good, anything else, any other questions? Awesome, you guys, thanks so much and I appreciate you guys. Thank you. Thank you.
